signal_title: Guidelines on the Protection of Minors
risk_rationale: The new EU guidelines introduce requirements that are not fully aligned with TikTok's current baseline, particularly concerning the reduction of exposure to addictive features and empowerment against cyberbullying. These gaps could lead to significant compliance risks if not addressed promptly.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Accounts for ages 13-17 are private by default
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline aligns with the regulatory requirement for private accounts by default, so no gap exists here.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Daily screen-time default is set to 60 minutes for under-18 accounts
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline does not explicitly address reducing exposure to addictive features beyond screen-time limits.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Teen reporting escalation to trusted adult
compliance_gaps.gap_description: While the baseline includes reporting escalation, it may not fully empower minors against cyberbullying as required by the new guidelines.

remediations.title: Implement Addictive Feature Controls
remediations.description: Introduce features to monitor and limit addictive behaviors, such as content consumption patterns and time spent on specific features.
acceptance_criteria: New controls are implemented to monitor addictive behaviors
Users receive notifications when addictive patterns are detected

remediations.title: Enhance Cyberbullying Protections
remediations.description: Develop tools and resources to empower minors against cyberbullying, including educational content and enhanced reporting mechanisms.
acceptance_criteria: New educational content on cyberbullying is available
Improved reporting tools for cyberbullying incidents

business_impact: Failure to comply with the new guidelines could result in regulatory scrutiny and potential fines, impacting TikTok's operations in the EU market.
recommended_actions: Prioritize the development of addictive feature controls
Enhance cyberbullying protections and educational resources
Conduct a comprehensive review of existing youth safety features to ensure alignment with new guidelines
